queries.question: List all duty-free shops and also show souvenir stores in terminal 3.
queries.sql:
SELECT DutyFreeShops.name
FROM DutyFreeShops
UNION
SELECT SouvenirStores.name
FROM SouvenirStores
WHERE SouvenirStores.Location = "Terminal 3"

queries.question: What duty-free shops and souvenir stores are in Terminal 3?
queries.sql:
SELECT DutyFreeShops.name
FROM DutyFreeShops
WHERE DutyFreeShops.Location = "Terminal 3"
UNION
SELECT SouvenirStores.name
FROM SouvenirStores
WHERE SouvenirStores.Location = "Terminal 3"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display duty-free shops and souvenir stores in terminal 3.
